sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n44671" key="eu)pa/laistos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">εὐπάλαιστος</orth> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">πᾰ], <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype></foreign>, <sense id="n44671.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">easy to overcome in wrestling</tr_>, [<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Epich.</author> </bibl>] <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0521.tlg001:254" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">254</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
